contexts.context: ..., and the driver Hassan, with his single <mark>cruise</mark> of water, and fan made of feathers,...
...also a small impropriety in Hassan's bearing himself the <mark>cruise</mark> of water, when he was master of laden...
...on February 1, 1709. His book, A <mark>Cruising</mark> Voyage Round the World (1712), sold well...
